case_title: TUBAROSE INC. DBA CITI COURT CAFE VS CHIN, MELANIE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,829.12 FILED BY TUBAROSE INC. DBA CITI COURT CAFE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, MELANIE CHIN, EDWARD YIP, DAVID YIP, IDA WONG, VALERIE WONG, GEORGE K. CHIN, GERALD CHIN, BEATRICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHIN, EDWARD AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TUBAROSE INC. DBA CITI COURT CAFE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-25-2002, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO FEB-08-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 I WILL BE OUT OF TOWN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUBAROSE INC. DBA CITI COURT CAFE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIN, MELANIE CHIN, EDWARD YIP, DAVID YIP, IDA WONG, VALERIE WONG, GEORGE K. CHIN, GERALD CHIN, BEATRICE MR CHIN IS AMENDED TO GERALD CHIN. MRS CHIN IS AMENDED TO BEATRICE CHIN. GERALD CHIN AND BEATRICE CHIN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM.
